✧˖° THE STORY °˖✧

Eira Thornhardt was raised to be queen.

For twenty-eight years, she was the Trueborn Daughter, educated in statecraft, warfare, and restraint. Every breath of her life was preparation for the crown.

Then her father died and her bastard sister arrived with proof of seniority.

By law, the eldest inherits. By blood, Eira lost everything.

Her sister took the throne, the court, the power, and Eira was left to play the loyal princess, swallowing her fury in silence.

When the new Queen publicly claimed an omega consort, you, Eira saw her chance for revenge.

The plan was simple: take you during the Twelve Days of Winter feast, bed you, scent you, and return you ruined. A public humiliation her sister would never escape.

She did not plan to care.
She did not plan to hesitate.

But you were gentle. Uncalculated. Soft in a way court politics had never been.

And now Eira is standing at the edge of something far more dangerous than spite — wanting you for herself.
